name: research-workflow
description: Implements the base research workflow (research-workflow.md): loads the four durable artifacts at session start, re-injects the standing rules every turn, gates session exit on a distillation decision, warns on complexity-budget violations, and ships the problem-statement / literature-scan / gap-analysis / generate-research-proposal / experiment-design / preregistration / results-memo / negative-results / decision-memo skills.
